key_characteristics: Comprehensive JavaDoc documentation with implementation requirements

patterns_discovered.description: Uses @Singleton for application-scoped singleton and @Inject for constructor injection
Leverages Hilt's @ApplicationContext qualifier to receive application context safely
Comprehensive JavaDoc comments outline all features and responsibilities before implementation
Skeleton created first with clear placeholder for future implementation phases

gotchas_discovered.description: Scanner registration/unregistration must be properly tied to application lifecycle to prevent resource leaks
300ms debounce requirement documented but not implemented; must prevent rapid duplicate scan events
API promises SharedFlow<ScanResult> but ScanResult data class and SharedFlow initialization not yet present
Implementation must handle Newland MT90-specific broadcast action (nlscan.action.SCANNER_RESULT) and trigger action

approach_outcome.summary: Singleton skeleton class successfully created with proper Hilt configuration and comprehensive documentation

recommendations.recommendation: Implement BroadcastReceiver registration in a LifecycleOwner-aware manner to handle lifecycle properly
recommendations.rationale: Prevents memory leaks and resource leaks from unregistered broadcast receivers

recommendations.recommendation: Create ScanResult data class with necessary fields (barcode content, timestamp, etc.)
recommendations.rationale: Required for the promised SharedFlow<ScanResult> API

recommendations.recommendation: Implement debouncing mechanism (300ms window as documented)
recommendations.rationale: Prevents duplicate scan event processing as per documented requirements

recommendations.recommendation: Add constants file or companion object for broadcast action strings
recommendations.rationale: Centralizes Newland-specific action constants and reduces magic strings

recommendations.recommendation: Plan unit tests for lifecycle, debouncing, and scan event processing
recommendations.rationale: Critical device interaction logic requires thorough test coverage

recommendations.recommendation: Document Newland MT90-specific integration requirements in README or wiki
recommendations.rationale: Helps future developers understand hardware-specific implementation details
